roster_note: Bounded confirmation pass over the Step 3.6 restructure — the run's riskiest change — rather than a full re-fan-out, since iteration 3's fix set was entirely shadow-promoted and already adversarially sourced.

phase3_findings.description: No findings at or above 80 confidence. Confirmed live against the shipped CLI: the bind fence is executable as written, the three-way branch is exhaustive against the exact tokens _binding_line emits, no dangling $MAIN_ROOT reference survives the move, query-nonce genuinely recovers the nonce, and the portable anchor stays inline.

The write-path-empty rationale asserted 'The skill composes this value in shell ("$MAIN_ROOT/.devflow/tmp/...")'. False against HEAD — both call sites substitute an already-resolved literal path. Mirrored in the run.sh comment, so a coupled pair.
'verified equal to the bound= root you just read' promises a comparison the procedure never instructs.
Sub-step 2's binding paragraph names itself the binding site for a case, then says binding is impossible in the only case it enumerates.

verification_evidence.suite: lib/test/run.sh — 9364 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped (committed HEAD 785948e5, after merging the remote main-merge that landed mid-run)
verification_evidence.lint: ruff: all checks passed; shellcheck --severity=warning -e SC1091: clean
